parameters.subject: [TEST] Your Paystub is Ready
parameters.html:
Hi {{ $json.name }},

Your paystub summary (amounts in PHP):

  • Pay period file: {{ $json.pay_period.hubstaff_source_file }}
  • PAB evaluation month: {{ $json.pay_period.pab_evaluation.month_label }}
  • Department: {{ $json.department_name }}
  • Hours (total / reg / OT): {{ $json.hours.total }} / {{ $json.hours.regular }} / {{ $json.hours.ot }}
  • Net pay (final): {{ $json.pay_php.final }}
  • Initial pay: {{ $json.pay_php.initial }}
  • PAB (Perfect Attendance): {{ $json.pay_php.perfect_attendance_bonus }}
  • Tech Bonus: {{ $json.pay_php.tech_bonus }}
  • Other bonuses: {{ $json.pay_php.other_bonuses }}

Regards,
HR Team

meta.description: Test workflow: triggered by HRIS 'Confirm Dispatch'. Accepts a payload with employees[] (paystubs) and/or receipts[] (orphanage: visit_wages | budget_request | gift_payment | tenure_gift). Switch node routes each row to the right email template. Replace SMTP credential and fromEmail before running.
